cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.3.4)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "CXX;RC")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.51.36231/bin/Hostx64/x64/cl.exe")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "MSVC")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "19.51.36248.0")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER "C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10/bin/10.0.26100.0/x64/rc.exe")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_ID "")
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILER_VERSION "")

project(CheckCUDA LANGUAGES CUDA)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER}\")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_HOST_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_CUDA_HOST_COMPILER}\")
")
